metadata.description: Primary references for evaluating agentic systems (task success, safety, reliability, latency, cost), tool sandboxing, multi-agent coordination, and LLM-as-judge patterns.

governance_and_risk.name: NIST AI Risk Management Framework
governance_and_risk.description: Governance baseline for risk assessment, controls, and documentation.

governance_and_risk.name: OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications
governance_and_risk.description: Threat categories for prompt injection, data leakage, and tool misuse; useful for adversarial testing.

governance_and_risk.name: EU AI Act (EUR-Lex)
governance_and_risk.description: Official EU AI Act text; use for compliance-related documentation, testing, and auditability requirements.

evaluation_frameworks.name: Anthropic - Demystifying Evals for AI Agents
evaluation_frameworks.description: Comprehensive eval strategies: 20-50 tasks from real failures, grade outcomes not paths, Swiss Cheese Model layering.

evaluation_frameworks.name: OpenAI Evals (GitHub)
evaluation_frameworks.description: Evaluation framework patterns and examples for automated scoring.

evaluation_frameworks.name: DeepEval
evaluation_frameworks.description: Open-source LLM evaluation framework with 14+ RAG metrics, agentic metrics, and pytest-style testing.

evaluation_frameworks.name: DeepEval AI Agent Evaluation Guide
evaluation_frameworks.description: Two-layer evaluation approach (reasoning vs action), six core metrics for agent evaluation.

evaluation_frameworks.name: RAGAS
evaluation_frameworks.description: Framework for evaluating RAG pipelines with context-grounded QA metrics.

evaluation_frameworks.name: Anthropic - Develop Tests
evaluation_frameworks.description: Testing guidance for Claude applications and prompts.

evaluation_frameworks.name: HELM Benchmark
evaluation_frameworks.description: Benchmarking framework and evaluation dimensions for language models.

evaluation_frameworks.name: Bloom - Automated Behavioral Evaluations
evaluation_frameworks.description: Anthropic's open-source tool for generating targeted behavioral trait evaluations.

tool_sandboxing.name: UK AISI Inspect Sandboxing Toolkit
tool_sandboxing.description: Government-backed sandboxing toolkit for secure AI agent evaluations with isolated execution.

tool_sandboxing.name: Agent Sandbox for Kubernetes
tool_sandboxing.description: Google Cloud's Kubernetes primitive for agent code execution with gVisor isolation.

tool_sandboxing.name: gVisor Documentation
tool_sandboxing.description: Container sandbox runtime reference; useful for designing stronger isolation tiers for agent eval execution.

multi_agent_testing.name: Game-Theoretic Lens on LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems (Survey)
multi_agent_testing.description: Survey framing of LLM-based multi-agent systems; useful background for coordination test design.

multi_agent_testing.name: MARBLE Benchmark
multi_agent_testing.description: Research framework and benchmark for multi-agent LLM coordination evaluation.

llm_as_judge.name: Survey on LLM-as-a-Judge (arXiv)
llm_as_judge.description: Comprehensive survey on biases, limitations, and best practices for LLM-based evaluation.

llm_as_judge.name: LMSYS - Chatbot Arena (Methodology)
llm_as_judge.description: Public LLM benchmarking methodology with pairwise comparisons and aggregation; useful for judge/arena-style eval design.

red_teaming_and_adversarial.name: Red Teaming Language Models (arXiv)
red_teaming_and_adversarial.description: Research reference for adversarial prompting and evaluation design.

research_and_benchmarks.name: Constitutional AI (arXiv)
research_and_benchmarks.description: Safety-aligned behavior via explicit principles; relevant for policy tests.

research_and_benchmarks.name: TruthfulQA (arXiv)
research_and_benchmarks.description: Benchmark reference for truthfulness and hallucination-oriented tests.

optional_tools.name: promptfoo
optional_tools.description: Prompt testing and evaluation tooling; Anthropic uses a version for product evals.

optional_tools.name: LangChain Evaluation
optional_tools.description: Optional: evaluation utilities; validate that metrics align with your oracles.
